description: Department, team, division, or business unit within the organization

name.description: Department or team name (e.g., Engineering, Marketing)

division.description: Higher-level division or business unit the department belongs to

head.description: Department head, director, or manager responsible for the team

headcount.description: Number of employees or team members in the department

function.description: Primary function or responsibility of the department (e.g., product development, sales, HR)
